name: Mailchimp
description: Monitor Mailchimp subscriber lists and data handling for email marketing compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Mailchimp
2. Go to Account & billing > Extras > API keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the full key (e.g., abc123def456-us1)
5. Enter the key and the data center suffix (the part after the dash, e.g., us1)

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Mailchimp > Account & billing > Extras > API keys. The key looks like abc123def456-us1.

credentialFields.label: Data Center
credentialFields.helpText: The data center suffix from your API key (the part after the dash, e.g., us1, us10, eu1).

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Mailchimp subscriber lists are maintained

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Mailchimp GDPR data management tools are configured
